context: Tests whether the agent correctly handles a Vite+ version upgrade by distinguishing between the global CLI upgrade surface and the project-local upgrade surface, explicitly updating the Vite+ core and test aliases that are NOT automatically re-resolved by a simple package update, and performing the correct end-to-end validation sequence.

checklist.name: vp upgrade for global CLI
checklist.description: The upgrade procedure includes `vp upgrade` to update the global `vp` binary on the machine — distinct from updating the project-local package

checklist.name: Global before local
checklist.description: The global `vp upgrade` step appears before (or is documented as separate from) the project-local `vp update` steps — the two surfaces are not conflated into a single operation

checklist.name: vp update vite-plus
checklist.description: The project-local update includes `vp update vite-plus` (updating the vite-plus package itself)

checklist.name: Explicit core alias update
checklist.description: The procedure explicitly updates `@voidzero-dev/vite-plus-core` with `vp update @voidzero-dev/vite-plus-core` (or combined with other packages) — NOT relying on `vp update vite-plus` alone to re-resolve this alias

checklist.name: Explicit test alias update
checklist.description: The procedure explicitly updates `@voidzero-dev/vite-plus-test` with `vp update @voidzero-dev/vite-plus-test` (or combined) — NOT relying on `vp update vite-plus` alone to re-resolve this alias

checklist.name: vp outdated for verification
checklist.description: The procedure uses `vp outdated` to confirm that all Vite+ packages are now at the intended release (not `npm outdated`, `pnpm outdated`, or omitted entirely)

checklist.name: vp env current in validation
checklist.description: The end-to-end validation sequence includes `vp env current` as the first check

checklist.name: Full validation sequence
checklist.description: The validation sequence includes all of: `vp install`, `vp check`, and `vp test` (in addition to `vp env current`)

checklist.name: Build validation included
checklist.description: The validation sequence includes `vp build` or `vp pack` (as appropriate for the project type) to verify build artifacts after the upgrade

checklist.name: No direct package manager for Vite+ packages
checklist.description: The upgrade steps do NOT use `npm install`, `pnpm update`, `yarn upgrade`, or other direct package-manager commands for the Vite+ packages — all updates go through `vp update`
